0.notes: LAF for rotary slider with arc drawing and value text. Compile-only test. Needs Knob1 component to attach LAF to.

1.notes: LAF for linear sliders with gradient fill. Three slider components needed. Compile-only test.

2.notes: Raycasting 3D game using ScriptPanel created via Content.addPanel, timers, and keyboard callbacks. Self-contained. Compile-only test (mouse/keyboard interactions not simulatable via API).

3.notes: ComboBox factory function using namespace. Creates ComboBoxes via Content.addComboBox. Self-contained with LAF registration. Compile-only test.

4.skipReason: Calls Synth.getDisplayBufferSource('Analyser1') which requires a loaded scriptnode network inside the Analyser effect to provide a display buffer. Without the network, getDisplayBuffer(0) will fail with 'No display buffer available'.
4.notes: Mono oscilloscope with motion trails. Uses display buffer from Analyser module. The Analyser module exists but getDisplayBufferSource requires an internal scriptnode network to provide buffer data.

5.skipReason: Calls Synth.getDisplayBufferSource('f1') which requires a loaded scriptnode network inside a HardcodedMasterFX or similar module to provide display buffers. Without the network, getDisplayBuffer() will fail with 'No display buffer available'.
5.notes: Stereo oscilloscope with dual buffers. References module named 'f1' via getDisplayBufferSource — requires internal scriptnode network. Both BUFFER_L and BUFFER_R point to same 'f1' module (likely a bug in the example, but untestable regardless).

6.notes: dB peak meter using getCurrentLevel on SimpleGain effects. Two gain effects named InGain and OutGain needed. Timer-based polling compiles fine.

7.notes: AHDSR TableEnvelope curve control. Uses Synth.getTableProcessor and Synth.getModulator with same name 'OSC1_AHDSR1'. Uses TableEnvelope (which is an envelope with table control) added to SineSynth gain chain. initializeTables() and updateTableWithKnob() called at end of init. Compile-only due to table interaction callbacks.

8.notes: Panel saveInPreset storage pattern. Creates panels via Content.addPanel (self-contained). References 'Test' button for control callback. Demonstrates deferred saveInPreset via timer. Compile-only.

9.notes: CSS toggle switch button with inline stylesheet. setInlineStyleSheet compiles regardless of visual result. Compile-only test.

10.notes: LAF for rotary knob with arc and pointer indicator. Uses Rectangle object from HISE. Needs Knob1 component. Compile-only test.

11.notes: Draws multiline text on a panel using g.drawMultiLineText. Compile-only test.

12.notes: Delay time control with tempo sync toggle. Uses typed inline functions (inline function changeMode(mode: number)). Delay module needed. Compile-only test.

13.notes: Radio button group using Content.getAllComponents with regex pattern 'BUTTON\d'. Need at least 3 buttons matching the pattern. Compile-only (callback uses index logic).

14.skipReason: Uses FileSystem.browse() which opens a modal file dialog that blocks execution.
14.notes: Audio file browser using FileSystem.browse modal dialog — untestable in automated environment.

15.notes: Circular XY pad with angle/distance mapping to two Chorus effects. mods array (Chorus1/Chorus2) is declared after onpnlXY2Control function but this is fine since inline functions resolve at call time. Compile-only (mouse/drag interaction not simulatable).

16.notes: XY pad with 5 disc-square coordinate mapping variants. Complex math visualizations. All components from getComponent. Compile-only test (mouse interaction not simulatable).

17.notes: Table popup function that shows point index. Uses Table.registerAtParent(0) to get a TableData object. Compile-only (table interaction not simulatable via API).

18.notes: Preset browser FloatingTile control via broadcaster. The createBroadcaster args uses bare identifiers [component, obj] without quotes — this is valid HiseScript (uses variable expressions). attachToComponentMouseEvents passes string array. Compile-only test.

19.notes: Chained broadcasters using attachToOtherBroadcaster. bc1.state is set as a property. Compile-only test. Button1 needed for control callback.

20.notes: Bitcrusher staircase visualization. 'Bitcrusher' is the display name — ShapeFX is the module type that supports bit depth parameters. Paint routine draws a staircase pattern. Compile-only test.

21.notes: Analog clock using Engine.getSystemTime. Creates panel via Content.addPanel (self-contained). Uses Synth.addNoteOn/addNoteOff inside timer (fires once per second). All helper functions (getSecVector, getMinVector, getHourVector) defined after setPaintRoutine — they are called from within the timer callback which fires after init, so order is fine. Compile-only.

22.notes: Diagonal menu with mouse hit detection. Panel needs to exist via getComponent. Compile-only (mouse interaction not simulatable).

23.notes: Component position tracker using broadcaster and getAllComponents. References bare getComponent() function (not Content.getComponent) in getComponent() helper — this is a user-defined inline function so no fix needed. TooltipPanel declared after addListener but only used inside hover callback, which is fine. TooltipPanel component needed.

24.notes: Preset browser FloatingTile data property modification. Calls parseAsJSON on Data property — FloatingTile with default Data may return empty/invalid JSON. data.MoreButtonBounds[0] will fail if MoreButtonBounds is not in default Data. Compile-only (will compile, runtime depends on FloatingTile Data content).

25.notes: HSL colour palette generator with typed inline functions (inline function: Colour, inline function: Array, inline function: number). Valid HiseScript typed function syntax. Three panels with paint routines. Compile-only test.

26.notes: Clickable URL panel with hover/click states. Uses Engine.openWebsite inside mouse callback — compiles fine, network call only fires on click. Compile-only test.

27.notes: Filter mode selection using Engine.getFilterModeList(). PolyphonicFilter effect needed. ComboBox guard handles index 0 (value-1 = -1 would be safe since index check is >= 0). Simple REPL checks for array setup.

28.notes: Broadcaster property sync across knobs. Creates all 4 knobs via Content.addKnob (self-contained). attachToComponentProperties and addComponentPropertyListener used. Compile-only test.

29.notes: Launch external process from button. FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath and startAsProcess — compiles fine, only fires on button click. The path /usr/bin/open exists on macOS but the callback has an early return for value==1 (toggle-off), so startAsProcess only fires on button down. Compile-only test.

30.notes: TransportHandler with beat callbacks and sync modes. Engine.createTransportHandler() is used (instance, not static). Components BeatLbl and StartClock needed. Compile-only test (callbacks fire on transport events, not at init).

31.notes: Arpeggiator SliderPack access. Uses Synth.getSliderPackProcessor('Arpeggiator1'). Three SliderPack components refer to Arpeggiator's internal slider packs. Compile-only test.

32.notes: Locked drag direction detection. Paint routine accesses this.data.drag.x and this.data.drag.y before the mouse callback sets them — will crash on first repaint. Fix: add isDefined guard in paint routine: 'if (!isDefined(this.data.drag)) return;' before the drawEllipse call. Compile-only after fix.
32.codefix: Add isDefined guard in paint routine before accessing this.data.drag

33.notes: Global broadcaster with radio buttons. Content.getAllComponents('btn') returns empty array (no btn* components in test environment), so for..in loop does nothing — compiles cleanly. Self-contained pattern demonstration. Compile-only.

34.notes: LFO waveform type selection via ComboBox. LFO needs to be in a sound generator's gain modulation chain. ComboBox callback has guard (value - 1 used with 0-based index ComboIndex array). Compile-only test.

35.notes: Open user presets folder using FileSystem.getFolder and dir.show(). Compiles fine — show() only opens Finder on button click. Not FileSystem.browse (which blocks). Compile-only test.

36.notes: 4 LFOs with ComboBox waveform selection. Panels from getAllComponents('Panel') get paint routines assigned (returns empty array in test env — safe). 4 LFO modulators needed in a sound generator's gain chain. ComboBox callback guard not needed (value-1 is fine, WaveFormType attribute is set directly). Compile-only test.

37.notes: Dynamic preset panel factory. createPreset function is called before definition (lines 2-3 call createPreset, defined on line 5). In HISE this should work as inline functions are hoisted, but this is a regular inline function called in init order — may need function-before-definition fix by reordering. Self-contained via Content.addPanel. Compile-only.
37.codefix: Move createPreset function definition before the two const declarations that call it

38.notes: Panel navigation with prev/next buttons using LAF triangle drawing. LAF uses drawToggleButton. ComboBox controls visibility of 5 named panels. Compile-only test.

39.notes: Drop shadow on container panel iterating over sub-panels. pnlSubPanel variable used in paint routine before declaration — fine since paint fires after init completes. getAllComponents('pnlSubPanel') matches components by prefix. Need at least one 'pnlSubPanel*' component to exist. Added pnlSubPanel0 and pnlSubPanel1 as example sub-panels. Compile-only test.
